name: mechanic
description: Cost-tiered mechanical subagents — two agents pinned to cheaper model versions to preserve premium (Opus / Sonnet 5) budget for judgment work. `mechanic` (Sonnet 4.6) for mechanical work that needs code/context comprehension (specified edits, cross-file refactors, boilerplate that must fit); `errand` (Haiku 4.5) for trivial self-contained transformations that need no codebase understanding (classify, extract, reformat, literal find/replace). Sharp routing: needs code understanding -> mechanic; needs a decision -> general-purpose; otherwise -> errand. Invoke via the Agent tool with subagent_type "mechanic" or "mechanic:errand".
